title: tricliceras tanacetifolium
intro: Tricliceras tanacetifolium, also known as the Fever Thorn, is a plant species belonging to the family Passifloraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Tricliceras tanacetifolium include its ability to treat fever, headaches, and other ailments. Herbal preparations of Tricliceras tanacetifolium typically involve the use of its leaves, which are either dried and made into teas or infused in oils for topical application.
